choose_one_or_more_ai: Khetha umntu omnye okanye ngaphezulu we-AI oza kubabandakanya kule ncoko.
title: {isihloko}
heading: {isihloko}
we_encountered_an_unexpected_error: Sifumene impazamo ebesingayilindelanga. Oku kunokuba kokwexeshana.
virtualmd_provides_ai_powered_health: I-VirtualMD inikezela ngolwazi lwezempilo oluxhaswe yi-AI kunye neenkonzo zeengcebiso. Abacebisi bethu be-AI abanazo iingcali zonyango kwaye abanakuthatha indawo yokhathalelo lobuchwephesha bonyango.
always_consult_with_qualified_healthcare: Soloko udibana nabanikezeli bezempilo abaqeqeshiweyo ukuze ufumane ukuxilongwa kunye nonyango. Kwimeko yongxamiseko lwezonyango, fowunela iinkonzo zikaxakeka ngokukhawuleza.
by_using_this_service_you: Ngokusebenzisa le nkonzo, uyavuma ukuba i-VirtualMD sisixhobo semfundo kunye nolwazi kuphela.
use_of_this_service_is: Ukusetyenziswa kwale nkonzo kuxhomekeke kwiMigqaliselo yethu yeNkonzo kunye noMgaqo-nkqubo waBucala. Ulwazi lwakho lwezempilo lukhuselwe kwaye luphathwa ngokuhambelana nemithetho esebenzayo yabucala.
virtualmd_is_a_registered_trademark: I-VirtualMD luphawu lwentengiso olubhalisiweyo. Ukusetyenziswa okungagunyaziswanga akuvumelekanga.
